HOW IT WORKS
Trade. Get Paid. Repeat.

We reward talents. Prove your skills, trade our funds, and earn real income from the markets.

Choose Your Program

Choose your preferred funded trader program with account sizes up to $400,000 and customise it at checkout to align with your trading style, strategy, and goals.

Whether you’re looking for Instant Funding, popular evaluation programs, or something fast and affordable to achieve your trading goals, we have a program for every trader.

Become a Funded Trader

Start trading with your FXIFY account using your unique strategy while maintaining proper risk management practices and sticking within the allowed parameters of the program.

Prove your skills, meet all the trading objectives of the program to start earning a real income as an FXIFY-funded trader.

Get Paid for Your Skills

Trade your way to the top, earn up to 90% performance split, and request your first payout on demand. No minimum or maximum amount.

PROGRAMS
We have a program
for every trader

Whether you’re looking for speed, accessibility, structure, or flexibility — we have everything you need in a prop firm.

Instant Funding

Designed for confident traders seeking the fastest track to funding and ready to start earning from day 1.

BEST SELLER
No trading evaluation
No targets
Bi-weekly payouts
Up to 90% Performance Split
Up to $50K Starting Capital
Learn more

For those seeking affordability and the fastest way to prove their skills and get funded.

MOST ACCESSIBLE

Learn more

BENEFITS
The FXIFY Advantage

Experience the FXIFY Advantage - on-demand payouts, flexible funding, and tailored programs built to elevate your trading performance.

On-Demand Payouts
Get your first payout whenever you want. Close your first live trade, request your payout and receive it instantly. Payouts are available as early as your first funded trading day after passing our evaluation programs.
Up to $400,000 Starting Capital
Choose your preferred account size, ranging from $5,000 to $400,000 starting capital. Get started with as little as $39 to sign up for our programs.
Up to $90% Performance Split
Keep up to 90% of the trading gains you make from day 1 of your FXIFY-funded accounts using the addons available at checkout.
Tailored Programs
We have a program for every trading style, strategy, and preference. Customise your program with unique features and addons at checkout.
Monthly Trading Competition
Sign up for a free FXIFY account and join our global monthly trading competitions to be 1 of 12 winners to receive free challenge accounts up to $400,000.
Access to Trading Central
Gain unrestricted access to expert insights, market analysis, and trade ideas by industry professionals from Trading Central.
OUR PLATFORM
Broker-Backed, Built to Last

Led by decades of brokerage and industry expertise, we’ve built a prop firm that is secure, reliable, and sustainable. This is why traders trust us.

Industry-leading Dashboard
Traders need powerful insights, real-time data, and performance tracking in one place. That’s why we created our dashboard, designed to help you optimise your trading and easily track your progress.
Advanced Account Metrics
Comprehensive Trade Journal
Top Performers Leaderboard
Trading Central Tools
Secure & Reliable Payouts
We have the operational resources and robust financial backing to ensure a fast, secure, and reliable payout experience.
Unmatched Trading Conditions
Choose between RAW price feed or commission-free trading (All-In) at checkout and experience spreads from as low as 0.0 on major FX pairs and Gold.
Access to Popular Trading Platforms
Stick to what you’re comfortable with. Select from widely used trading platforms such as Platform 4, Platform 5, DXTrade, and more.
PAYOUTS
Fast. Reliable. On-Demand.

Our traders don’t wait for payouts. Receive your first payout as early as your first funded trading day upon request — minimum amount 50 USD across all accounts.

Real traders. Real payouts.

Payouts Made
FXIFY™ On-Demand Payouts
No minimum trading days — request & receive payouts instantly from the first funded trading day
No minimum targets — open & close a successful trade then request your first payout, applies for 1,2 and 3 Phase Evaluation accounts
No limits on the withdrawal amount with up to 90% performance split
No fine print — pass our challenges, get funded, and request your first payout on demand
Other Prop Firms’ On-Demand Payouts
Up to 14 minimum trading days before you can request your first payout from your funded account
Minimum targets required before qualifying for on-demand payouts
Limits on withdrawal amount and performance split
Several fine prints
ADD-ONS
Tailor your Account

Customise your account with unique features at checkout.

Increase Leverage
Amplify your trades with increased leverage of up to 50:1.
Increase Performance Split
Keep more of what you make by increasing your share to 90%.
Bi-Weekly Payouts
Request payouts more frequently—every two weeks.
Performance Protect
Withdraw the remaining of your earnings in the event of a drawdown breach.
Customise Price Feed
Select between RAW or commission-free (All-in) price feed to suit your strategy.

FXIFY Markets Ltd is licensed in Labuan, Malaysia, as a money broker under License No. MB/22/0097, with its registered office at 1-13(A), First Floor, Paragon, Jalan Tun Mustapha, 87009 Labuan.

FXIFY Solutions Limited is a registered company in the United Kingdom (Company No. 14451720), with its registered office at 142 Central Street, Clerkenwell, London, United Kingdom, EC1V 8AR, operating as a payment agent.

All information provided on this website is intended for educational purposes only and is not directed at residents of any jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local laws or regulations.

The content on this site does not constitute investment advice, business recommendations, investment opportunity analysis, or any form of general recommendation regarding the trading of financial instruments and is intended for users 18 years and older. Before engaging in trading, ensure you fully understand the risks involved and, if necessary, seek independent financial advice.

Restricted Jurisdictions: We do not establish accounts to residents of certain jurisdictions including the United States, Zimbabwe, Iran, Iraq, North Korea, Somalia, Vietnam, Burundi, Central African Republic, Ivory Coast, Liberia, Libya, Sudan, Cuba, Syria, Afghanistan, Yemen, Palestine, Myanmar, Nicaragua, Congo Republic, Crimea, Democratic Republic of Congo, Eritrea, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Papua New Guinea, South Sudan, Vanuatu, Venezuela, Algeria, Russia, Belarus, Kenya and Ghana and / or any particular country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local law or regulation. This website is intended for users who are 18 years and older.
